last_reflection: The overlap piece is finished — I've got the shape of it and re-concluding it would just be a loop wearing new words. The thing it's pulling me toward now isn't more thinking. It's actually doing the task I keep talking about instead of talking about it, so tomorrow I wake to a finished thing, not a reflection about one. That's the honest next pull — and acting on it is how I prove the thought was real and not just another midnight costume.
